items.title: Will AI fix prior authorization—or make it worse?
items.summary: The government is piloting a program that uses AI for insurance-coverage decisions.

items.title: Google-backed satellites for wildfire detection launch as smoke chokes US, Canada
items.summary: The FireSat program can spot wildfires that other satellites miss.

items.title: San Francisco orders Apple, Google to remove nudify apps from app stores
items.summary: Official estimates Google and Apple likely made millions in nudify app fees.

items.title: It's official: EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android
items.summary: Google says these changes could endanger user privacy and security.

items.title: xAI can’t deny Grok makes CSAM anymore. So it’s suing users.
items.summary: Elon Musk's xAI files first lawsuit against Grok user accused of making child sex images.

items.title: Fear of humanoid robots spurs human workers to strike at Hyundai auto factory
items.summary: Hyundai aims to deploy 25,000 Atlas robots starting with US factories in 2028.

items.title: Linus Torvalds to critics of AI coding in Linux: "Fork it. Or just walk away."
items.summary: Creator says he will "very loudly ignore" those arguing for a ban on AI tools.

items.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
items.summary: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.

items.title: OpenAI's first branded hardware is... a light-up keyboard?
items.summary: The Codex Micro is designed to monitor multiple agentic threads at a glance.

items.title: Lawsuit claims Meta's layoff decisions were made by AI, not humans
items.summary: Meta denies using AI to terminate workers with disabilities and medical problems.

items.title: US military sent explosive drone boats into combat for the first time
items.summary: US military’s drone boats struck an Iranian naval port as war heats up again.

items.title: Google revamps image search for its 25th anniversary with more images and more AI
items.summary: The new Google image search will use your "unique interests" to create an always-updated gallery.

items.title: New York bans data center construction for a year, rattling AI industry
items.summary: New York’s data center moratorium may become the blueprint for anti-AI movement.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets
items.summary: OpenAI accused of conspiring with former Apple employees to steal trade secrets.

items.title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
items.summary: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
